compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing test for Part C expanded trigger
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Create tests/hooks/test-part-c-trigger.sh asserting Part C trigger in epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md mentions moving/deprecating/removing/renaming.

Given/When/Then: Given Part C section exists, When grepping for deprecation trigger keywords, Then assertion matches.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-part-c-trigger.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-part-c-trigger.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED) against unmodified Part C trigger
  Verify: ! bash tests/hooks/test-part-c-trigger.sh 2>/dev/null
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker
  Verify: grep 'epic-scrutiny-pipeline' .test-index | grep -q '\[test_'

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ — RED test written: tests/hooks/test-part-c-trigger.sh. Asserts Part C trigger mentions deprecating/relocating/renaming (fails RED against current unmodified file). RED marker [test_part_c_contains_deprecation_trigger] added to .test-index. Review passed, committed 678bb28b, harvested.
comments.author: Test
